channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The three disciplines separating AI agent demos from real-world deployment
item.description: Getting AI agents to perform reliably in production — not just in demos — is turning out to be harder than enterprises anticipated. Fragmented data, unclear workflows, and runaway escalation rates are slowing deployments across industries.“The technology itself often works well in demonstrations,” said Sanchit Vir Gogia, chief analyst with Greyhound Research. “The challenge begins when it is asked to operate inside the complexity of a real organization.” Burley Kawasaki, who oversees agent deployment at Creatio, and team have developed a methodology built around three disciplines: data virtual...

item.title: Ads are coming to Apple Maps, as Apple expands its business offerings
item.description: Apple Maps will launch ads this summer in the U.S. and Canada. Plus, a new suite of Apple Business offerings arrives April 14.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Wednesday, March 25 (game #1521)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Wednesday, March 25 (game #1018)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Wednesday, March 25 (game #752)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Exclusive: This iconic Call of Duty zombies perk has been reborn as a collectible controller add-on
item.description: KontrolFreek has revealed its latest collectible Call of Duty controller add-on and it's inspired by a zombies perk.

item.title: Spotify takes its first major step in tackling AI slop — now artists can review and approve what music appears on their profile
item.description: Artist Protection Profile gives artists an active role in reviewing what music releases appear in their name.

item.title: Ai2 releases MolmoWeb, an open-weight visual web agent with 30K human task trajectories and a full training stack
item.description:
Engineers building browser agents today face a choice between closed APIs they cannot inspect and open-weight frameworks with no trained model underneath them. Ai2 is now offering a third option.The Seattle-based nonprofit behind the open-source OLMo language models and Molmo vision-language family today is releasing MolmoWeb, an open-weight visual web agent available in 4 billion and 8 billion parameter sizes.
Until now, no open-weight visual web agent shipped with the training data and pipeline needed to audit or reproduce it. MolmoWeb does.
MolmoWebMix, the accompanying dataset, includes ...

item.title: Apple Business | Apple tente une nouvelle percée en entreprise
item.description: Apple lancera le 14 avril prochain un nouveau service destiné aux entreprises en général et aux gestionnaires TI en particulier. Appelée Apple Business, cette nouveauté prend la forme d’une plateforme tout-en-un d’où il sera possible de gérer rapidement les appareils de marque Apple qu’utilisent les employés d’une entreprise, ainsi que les applications et les services associés....

item.title: Acquisition du studio américain The Fun Pimps | Behaviour se renforce dans l’horreur interactive
item.description: Le studio montréalais de jeux vidéo Behaviour Interactif a mis la main sur 7 Ways do Die et sur son créateur, le studio américain The Fun Pimps. Cela renforce la position dans les jeux à monde ouvert en général et dans l’horreur immersive en particulier du plus important créateur indépendant de jeux vidéo au Canada.

item.title: Meta’s reckoning over kids safety is in the hands of two juries
item.description: Two juries are currently deliberating a series of cases that could either usher in a legal reckoning for Meta, or maintain the status quo in an uphill battle to impose changes or penalties on tech platforms in court. Yesterday, a New Mexico jury heard closing arguments in a trial where Meta is accused of facilitating […]

item.title: ‘I am not a fan of AI’: Apple’s co-founder slams artificial intelligence, saying it lacks human emotional depth
item.description: Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak says AI falls short when compared to human beings.

item.title: More than 10,000 have bought Amazon's Fire TV Stick 4K Plus this month — and it's so cheap right now, I'm buying it too
item.description: The powerful Fire TV Stick 4K Plus is Amazon's top-selling device, and it's on sale right now for a record-low price of just $24.99 - a deal so good that I'm adding it to my cart.

item.title: Fortnite maker Epic is laying off over 1,000 workers
item.description: Layoffs have hit Fortnite developer Epic Games again. Today CEO Tim Sweeney announced that the company is cutting more than 1,000 jobs, citing a downturn in engagement for Fortnite dating back to last year. "This layoff, together with over $500 million of identified cost savings in contracting, marketing, and closing some open roles puts us […]

item.title: Roku’s $3 Howdy subscription service launches on Prime Video
item.description: Launched in August 2025, Howdy features a library of nearly 10,000 hours of content from its partners, including Lionsgate, Sony Pictures, Disney Entertainment, Warner Bros. Discovery, and FilmRise, alongside select Roku Original titles.

item.title: Early Amazon Spring Sale standing desk deals: 11 top-rated FlexiSpot desks to get before tomorrow's chaos
item.description: 11 of our favorite sit-stand desks from FlexiSpot are discounted ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: John Deere, Garmin, and Philips may have undermined military right to repair
item.description: Last year, Congress dropped widely supported military right-to-repair provisions from the annual defense policy bill - and now we may know who was pushing them to do it. Recently released lobbying reports reveal that companies like John Deere, Garmin, Philips, and many others have collectively spent millions of dollars on lobbying efforts related to the […]...

item.title: FCC bans import of new consumer routers made overseas, citing security risks
item.description: The FCC ban will affect the import of all new, foreign-made consumer routers, the agency's head Brendan Carr said.

item.title: Transformer sa Nintendo Switch en Xbox portable, c’est possible avec ce logiciel
item.description: La Nintendo Switch, première du nom, continue de faire parler d'elle. Cette fois, parce qu'elle peut faire tourner des jeux Xbox via le Xbox Game Pass.

item.title: Il rentre dans le salon pour épater la galerie : ce TV Samsung QLED 4K de 75″ fait son cinéma avec son prix en baisse de 350 €
item.description: Le téléviseur Samsung TQ75Q7F est un objet de divertissement plutôt orienté vers le cinéma qui est disponible actuellement pour 649,99 euros au lieu de 999,99 euros sur Joybuy.

item.title: The Punisher’s Standalone Special Is Coming Very Soon
item.description: Frank Castle will ride solo between 'Daredevil: Born Again' and 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' when 'The Punisher: One Last Kill' hits Disney+ in May.

item.title: Physicists Stretch, Blur, and Reverse Time’s Arrow in Wild Quantum Engine
item.description: The research showcases yet another way quantum systems evade common sense—and still be useful.

item.title: Asus ROG’s Massive Swift OLED Gaming Monitor Epitomizes Excess in the Best Way
item.description: Do you want the prettiest, most in-your-face gaming monitor? You could do worse than the third-gen ROG Swift OLED.

item.title: Après une présentation très critiquée, le patron de Nvidia joue les pompiers pour sauver DLSS 5
item.description: DLSS 5 n'est techniquement pas un filtre IA, mais il n'empêche : le risque est réel d'uniformiser l'esthétique des jeux vidéo sous une épaisse couche d'« IA slop ». Après avoir affirmé que les critiques avaient « tout faux », le patron de Nvidia a mis de l'eau dans son vin.

item.title: ‘For All Mankind’ Will Return for a Sixth and Final Season
item.description: Ahead of this week's fifth-season premiere, Apple TV announced the alternate reality space show is coming to an end.

item.title: Akai just released a portable and relatively budget-friendly MPC sampler
item.description: Akai just revealed specs and other details about the MPC Sample after teasing the gadget earlier this month. This is a portable sampler and groovebox that looks eerily similar to Teenage Engineering's EP series. It also resembles some legendary Akai gadgets from decades past, including the MPC3000 and MPC60. In other words, it's easy on the eyes and sort of looks like a Super Famicom. It seems pretty capable. The Sample has 16 velocity-sensitive MPC pads with poly aftertouch, which should please finger drummers. It can handle 32 stereo voices of polyphony and there's a sequencer for making act...

item.title: The MPC Sample is my new favorite portable beat maker
item.description: Akai MPC is one of the most storied names in music history. But over the last decade, it's strayed pretty far from its roots as a humble sampler. The modern MPCs run virtual synthesizers, have complex arrangement tools, and sport large touchscreens. They have more in common with your computer running a DAW than they […]

item.title: For All Mankind will end with season 6
item.description: For All Mankind starts streaming again this week, with its fifth season set to premiere on March 27th. But Apple is also taking this moment to clarify the show's future - it's been renewed for a sixth season, which will also be its last. For All Mankind premiered in 2019 as part of Apple TV's […]

item.title: Amnezia VPN drops new AmneziaWG 2.0 protocol as censorship tactics grow smarter
item.description: Amnezia VPN’s new protocol, AmneziaWG 2.0, aims to secure internet access in heavily censored regions by hiding VPN traffic in plain sight.

item.title: 'Put Claude to work': Claude can now use your computer autonomously, you just have to tell it what to do
item.description: Anthropic has updated the Claude app to control your Mac's apps if third-party integrations fail to achieve what you want.

item.title: Panasonic’s ‘most advanced travel zoom camera’ gets a surprise successor 8 years later — here are two major differences
item.description: Panasonic updates its popular Lumix ZS200 / TZ200 travel compact from 2018 with the new ZS300 / TZ300.

item.title: Lumix TZ3000 : Panasonic lance l’appareil photo de poche ultime pour le voyage
item.description: Panasonic a dévoilé ce mardi son nouvel appareil photo compact expert, le Panasonic Lumix TZ3000, doté d'un capteur un pouce et d'un zoom x15.

item.title: Carburant trop cher : les Français se ruent sur les voitures électriques d’occasion
item.description: La flambée des prix à la pompe provoquée par la guerre au Moyen-Orient bouscule en profondeur le marché automobile français. Alors que le litre de carburant frôle désormais les 2 euros, de plus en plus d’automobilistes se tournent en urgence vers la voiture électrique d’occasion, perçue comme une solution plus économique pour continuer à se déplacer au quotidien....

item.title: L’IA Claude peut contrôler votre ordinateur pour travailler à votre place
item.description: Anthropic ne compte pas se laisser distancer par l'IA agentique OpenClaw. Claude est désormais capable d'agir à votre place sur votre ordinateur.

item.title: Nintendo has reportedly cut Switch 2 production significantly due to weak holiday sales and now aims to produce 4 million units instead of 6 million this quarter
item.description: Nintendo is reportedly cutting down Nintendo Switch 2 production following disappointing sales during the holiday season.

item.title: Les gamers vont l’adorer : ce moniteur QD-OLED à 500 Hz coûte 100 € de moins
item.description: Pour les gamers en quête de fluidité et d’une belle image, l’écran Acer Predator X27UF5 est en promotion à 699 euros au lieu de 799 euros. Doté d’une dalle QD-OLED et d’un impressionnant taux de rafraîchissement de 500 Hz, il promet des sessions de jeu ultra immersives et réactives.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Code and Cowork can control your computer
item.description: Anthropic has updated Claude to perform tasks in its Code and Cowork AI tools autonomously by using your computer for you. The new feature can be used to automatically open files, use web browsers and apps, and run dev tools "with no setup required," even when you're away from your computer, according to Anthropic's announcement. […]

item.title: Fast, modular, and solar-powered: a better way to build data centers
item.description: Last year, Redwood Materials and data center company Crusoe partnered on a first-of-a-kind solar microgrid with secondhand EV batteries. Now, with proof that it works, they’re expanding. A little less than eight months ago, Crusoe and Redwood Materials launched a new kind of project: a modular data center powered by solar panels and repurposed EV batteries....

item.title: Le design de l’iPhone 17 Pro pour moitier moins cher : ce que l’on sait des futurs Honor 600
item.description: Honor s'apprête à renouveler ses smartphones milieu de gamme. Des rendus dévoilent des design qui dépassent presque l'hommage à Cupertino.

item.title: Les États-Unis interdisent les routeurs fabriqués à l’étranger
item.description: Il va être difficile de se procurer un routeur aux États-Unis. La FCC, le régulateur américain des communications, a en effet décidé que seuls les routeurs fabriqués au pays pourront y être commercialisés. Plus de la moitié de ces appareils sont fabriqués en Chine, mais il s'agit d'une question de sécurité nationale.

item.title: Meet the cover stars of Fast Company’s Most Innovative Companies issue
item.description: Innovation isn’t a spark—it’s a sustained pursuit. Meet Google, Proximity Media, Google, Reddit, Unwell and Tubi—the teams turning bold vision into daily discipline, redefining what it takes to lead, create, and stay ahead. Innovation isn’t a spark—it’s a sustained pursuit. Meet Google, Proximity Media, Google, Reddit, Unwell and Tubi—the teams turning bold vision into daily discipline, redefining what it takes to lead, create, and stay ahead....

item.title: Comment installer et configurer un VPN sur Mac ?
item.description: Un VPN est aujourd'hui essentiel pour se protéger des menaces qui pullulent en ligne : surveillance, vol de données, piratage... Mais savez-vous comment configurer proprement un VPN sur Mac ? Si ce n'est pas le cas, voici notre tutoriel.

item.title: 'That branch of AI is lethal. We've got to do something about that' — Neil deGrasse Tyson wants to ban AI superintelligence
item.description: Neil deGrasse Tyson’s call to ban AI superintelligence underscores rising fears that future AI could outpace human control and force global action

item.title: « Nous sommes le seul opérateur en France à faire croître ses revenus » : Free réussit à garder la tête hors de l’eau dans un marché stagnant
item.description: Ce matin, Free a invité la presse afin de présenter ses résultats financiers sur l'année 2025. Malgré des vents contraires et un marché amorphe, le trublion des télécoms continue d'afficher des résultats positifs. Le groupe Iliad s'affiche ainsi comme leader de la croissance en France et en Europe.

item.title: PS5 console architect Mark Cerny confirms FSR Frame Generation is coming to PlayStation 'at some point' but not in 2026 — 'All I can say is that we have no more releases planned for this year'
item.description: Sony has confirmed that PlayStation will soon receive AMD's FSR (FidelityFX Super Resolution) Frame Generation technology.

item.title: Ayaneo says selling its Windows gaming handheld ‘is no longer sustainable’
item.description: Ayaneo is suspending preorders for its $1,999 Next 2 gaming handheld due to the skyrocketing price of digital storage. In a post on Monday, Ayaneo says the overall cost to build its Windows handheld now nearly doubles the price it originally set, making it "unsustainable" to continue selling. "Even before the launch of NEXT 2, […]

item.title: As airport lines snarl, senators find a potential breakthrough in Homeland Security stalemate
item.description: The deal being considered would finance most of the Department of Homeland Security, but exclude funding for a key part of ICE. Senators are discussing a proposal to end the Homeland Security budget stalemate by funding much of the department, including the Transportation Security Administration airport workers going without pay, but excluding ICE’s enforcement and removal operations that have been core to the dispute.The potential breakthrough came after a group of Republican senators headed to the White House late Monday to meet with President Donald Trump. Senators said they expected the ne...
